name: 扶正v7
content: An extreme close-up, absolute orthographic top-down texture tile, meticulously cropped into a perfect 1:1 square. The single product surface texture is magnified and cropped so that the texture details 'bleed' or run off all four physical image edges (top, bottom, left, and right) continuously. This image is not a 'product shot'; it is a flawless, flat, geometry-corrected section of texture. Zero padding. Zero white borders on *any* edge (top, bottom, left, right). The texture itself *is* the entire frame, edge-to-corner. Every square pixel is forced product texture. No perspective distortion, absolute zero tilt, zero skew, zero depth of field. Even, flat, shadowless professional lighting across the entire 100% surface area. Sharp focus on all graphics, text, and details.
negative_prompt: margins, borders, white borders, top margin, bottom margin, side margins, padding, empty space, negative space, background, object in a void, isolated subject, complete subject outline, 3D perspective, isometric view, tilt, skew, rotation, depth of field, shadows, rounded corners, unaligned edges, frame.

name: 一键保存历史提示词测试
content: Place the reference product (from the provided image) into this scene: Lifestyle scene in a modern bathroom with natural light streaming through a window. Product placed on marble countertop beside a jade plant and ceramic dish, partially filled with water to show droplets. Cap slightly open, suggesting recent use, with a soft towel in the background. CRITICAL: The product's appearance must be IDENTICAL to the reference image — preserve its exact shape, design, colors, branding, and surface details. Only the background, environment, lighting angle, and composition may change.
